description_en: Shanghai may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 35 halal restaurants and 14 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Shanghai, China, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Shanghai: 35+ halal restaurants, 14 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.4/5.
